title: Japanese Tempting Pudding Parfait
description: A unique Japanese-inspired dessert featuring silky pudding, tempting yogurt, and a touch of Uruguay flair.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together pudding mix and Uruguayan vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, mix together yogurt and tempting syrup or honey until well combined.
Spoon a layer of pudding mixture into a parfait glass or tall clear cup.
Follow with a layer of yogurt mixture.
Repeat steps 3-4 until all ingredients are used.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
